title: selaginella martensii
intro: Selaginella martensii, also known as Yu Xing Cao or 'Hesperopteron', is a species of resurrection fern that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae, a group of vascular plants that can survive extreme environmental conditions by drying out and rehydrating when water becomes available. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Selaginella martensii include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, improve kidney function, and reduce oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, and its dried leaves and stems are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
